facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: South Third old sorting yard near the side storage cut and shaft mouth, back on the surface-facing industrial level under guild and Pike Holdings oversight

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Unranked, unlicensed salvage runner; bruised, dust-choked, exhausted, and newly more politically alert after leading survivors out through an unmapped service corridor; Residual Hearing remains ungraded with a retained provisional record and explicit notice that claim relevance is recognized but legal standing is insufficient

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Obtain legal standing by qualifying for provisional delver status, secure the fee or bond needed to sit the screen, and file claim-relevant salvage information on the old corridor before Pike Holdings captures it

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Rowan still lacks rank, license, money, and institutional protection; South Third access is now restricted pending review; Pike Holdings and guild officials are positioned to suppress or appropriate the route; Benn and Derren remain missing; multiple witnesses are injured or being separated into statements

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Rowan retains practical trust from Lio and Sena, reluctant cooperation from Mett, and rough respect from Toma and Jeren after the escape; Lio provides actionable information about the provisional qualification process; bystanders in the yard show slight sympathy but no committed support

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: The immediate underground escape is over, but the struggle has shifted into legal-economic conflict: Rowan must beat Pike Holdings and guild process to paper the old route into a claim while protecting his father from debt pressure and navigating incomplete system recognition tied to the corridor
